title: Document profiler.js, latency-log.js, sox.js, download-state.js in ARCHITECTURE.md
description: Add documentation for undocumented utility modules: src/detector/sox.js (ensureSox — auto-detect/install sox audio tool), src/cli/download-state.js (model download progress state management), and verify src/runtime/latency-log.js (record/p95/reset) is documented. NOTE: profiler.js signatures in ARCHITECTURE.md were already updated (endMark→number|null, getMetrics→{[stage]:{last,avg,count}}, measurePipeline→{stages,total,pass}) — just verify they match implementation and add the other missing modules.
